migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
description: Ingestion source manifest (PR-5). Records the raw transcript inputs by content hash WITHOUT committing them. raw_committed is false for every entry: the .docx files are processed privately as source ore, never checked into this repo. What the repo ships is refined, original learning objects (concept inventories, coverage/gap maps) plus this audit — never transcript bodies. See 00-governance-spec.md section 6 and the Course Transcript IP Boundary in section 3.

authorization.scope: Private/local processing of the listed transcripts as source inputs only. No raw or verbatim transcript content may be committed. Preserve instructional essence as original structured learning objects.
authorization.decision_ref: PR-5 notes-handling decision: 'Manifest + audit + semantic distillation'
